# terrible_community_general_iso_customize (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `dest_iso` (String) The path of the customized ISO file.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `src_iso` (String) This is the path of source ISO file.

### Optional

- `add_files` (String) Allows to add and replace files in the ISO file. It creates intermediate folders inside the ISO file when they do not exist.
- `delete_files` (String) Absolute paths for files inside the ISO file that should be removed.
